name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: The flu, a new contest, and getting back to school
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194y_Il4GDaw2mt9nIKOO7U6JYhkj7-UlT3krgd23BfrzrJ6tS1f2UTZaQ29kLUc53qu47ay35lP9wO3esEwsa4f5Mbn7ZA8PtKsjWdoSp0xE6VKIpxj_sA844A6EuJgxju25qo0HKaBnGHsJz5nryvfNuAvc4VtB4bwaGsAnw8QkwL1qK-ZWIGe6AL4ukN-kuhWbGmDVAL9DNauih7E2lDdEMPc-85OHFBYSGSsfyvhB4MkGNR6apWW76nG-easXgZe6B1lyIdHRNP3R0dOQsalwEAJ2JTzADuN5dQ0lbHazcO-jaT8Jx4C6DquUG6SZi61Mn0UzjDo=&c=KFaTFzIXEb8Zc2CGn4OaMp5r_3xtMBI2LcCoy1v6LeoHbV3A_UWkRg==&ch=ZepveFUpHqizWXgKPL-2GQ3K2rk4gLrYdej8d3ab6CRjhIWfasXhIw==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
FLU VACCINATIONS
This flu season, vaccination is going to be more important than ever. We cannot let our emergency departments and our healthcare system get overrun by waves of people dealing with the flu while the healthcare system is also dealing with COVID.

We're partnering with organizations so that everyone can quickly and easily get their flu shot, with a particular focus on areas that are hardest hit by COVID. We're also going to be setting up clinics at COVID testing sites for people who are asymptomatic. Even if you don't have insurance, you will still be able to get a flu shot at no cost. We've ordered 150,000 more doses of flu vaccine this year than we usually do, and we're ready to bring more vaccine into the state if it's needed.
| | |
---|---
|
CRUSH COVID

There's a new update available for CRUSH COVID on the Apple App Store and Google Play. This update includes a new symptom tracking tool that can tell you if you should self-isolate or not, and track and log symptoms not just for yourself, but for up to 10 people in your household.

And yesterday, we launched "Screen and Get Away" \-- a chance to win a free night's stay at a hotel in Providence. Entering is easy. We're asking Rhode Islanders to download CRUSH COVID, complete your Symptom Diary, and submit a screenshot for seven consecutive days to enter for a chance to win a night's stay at the Renaissance, the Dean or Hotel Providence. Contest details including eligibility and instructions can be found [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194y_Il4GDaw2mt9nIKOO7U6JYhkj7-UlT3krgd23BfrzrJ6tS1f2UTZaQ29kLUc5lA_AqusE6bOLaZQPeuDLZHF95mbcCeccddq-mbBOy7pDVWtO4Ul9xCTFTpunIQJyhSxqbWVaO-1WXxJSdAjhBUsJ_x3wTE5PVDhdyuN0R7Xxv4YfKKGn8yutPCtChmRDO7SPHf6P9aXWTTIaKjCs8emE70jqcLXYwFuhDqzgMP41n1rF1KMpwP1zsugDAJpF&c=KFaTFzIXEb8Zc2CGn4OaMp5r_3xtMBI2LcCoy1v6LeoHbV3A_UWkRg==&ch=ZepveFUpHqizWXgKPL-2GQ3K2rk4gLrYdej8d3ab6CRjhIWfasXhIw==).
| | |
---|---
|
BACK TO SCHOOL FORUMS

This week, joined by the Department of Health's Dr. Jim McDonald and Barbara Cottam, Chair of the Rhode Island Board of Education, we devoted our entire forum to answering some of the questions submitted by more than 100 students on topics like social distancing, graduations, and how to wear your mask without getting your glasses all fogged up. You can watch it [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194y_Il4GDaw2mt9nIKOO7U6JYhkj7-UlT3krgd23BfrzrJ6tS1f2UTZaQ29kLUc5AZV1JqMtzvFEkMW4G3nN7zVylkmIauXOe3FcWmyUA656vgvqYhf6nSK-AhnKlu4JN9_uYF2NzZx_LtJxUVwmnwL8KbLAPy8Mf5WSCzf1d1oBqmvvfCz1GHu859Ugc_EH&c=KFaTFzIXEb8Zc2CGn4OaMp5r_3xtMBI2LcCoy1v6LeoHbV3A_UWkRg==&ch=ZepveFUpHqizWXgKPL-2GQ3K2rk4gLrYdej8d3ab6CRjhIWfasXhIw==).

This was our last Back to School forum, but you can watch all of the previous conversations on my Facebook page. Over the past few months, Commissioner Infante-Green and I have talked to a wide range of experts, from local child psychologists to Dr. Anthony Fauci, about what school is going to look like this year. I hope we've answered your questions along the way and that what you've heard has helped you feel more comfortable sending your children back to school this fall.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194y_Il4GDaw2mt9nIKOO7U6JYhkj7-UlT3krgd23BfrzrJ6tS1f2UTZaQ29kLUc53qu47ay35lP9wO3esEwsa4f5Mbn7ZA8PtKsjWdoSp0xE6VKIpxj_sA844A6EuJgxju25qo0HKaBnGHsJz5nryvfNuAvc4VtB4bwaGsAnw8QkwL1qK-ZWIGe6AL4ukN-kuhWbGmDVAL9DNauih7E2lDdEMPc-85OHFBYSGSsfyvhB4MkGNR6apWW76nG-easXgZe6B1lyIdHRNP3R0dOQsalwEAJ2JTzADuN5dQ0lbHazcO-jaT8Jx4C6DquUG6SZi61Mn0UzjDo=&c=KFaTFzIXEb8Zc2CGn4OaMp5r_3xtMBI2LcCoy1v6LeoHbV3A_UWkRg==&ch=ZepveFUpHqizWXgKPL-2GQ3K2rk4gLrYdej8d3ab6CRjhIWfasXhIw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=04cf0d4d-e503-4673-a7eb-4f4d5ee4b3a4)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

While my opponent will say anything to get elected, you can trust me to keep my word.
Friend,

While my opponent will say anything to get elected, you can trust me to keep my word. From protecting Social Security and Medicare to protecting our land and water — I’ll always stand up for you and our shared future.

**But in order to represent you in Congress, I need your help right now.**

We’ve launched our first television ad, digital ads are running across the district, and we are sending out mail to voters before their ballots arrive — but in order to continue reaching out to the voters we need to flip this seat from red to blue, we must have the necessary resources to continue funding our outreach efforts.

**That’s where you come in, friend.**

**[We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before Tuesday so we can stay on track before our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline before the election and we still have $12,750 to go. Can you contribute any amount you can afford right now to help us reach our critical fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19135675/250700077/1073285021?refcode2=a62a3c77-dcf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=3294369f-dbf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=a62a3c77-dcf5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091120-es-mm-fr-series-4-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjJhM2M3Ny1kY2Y1LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gidLKVnHMZogEE0ManpnjtXEhrt3dU5KJa9G6Ob6s58=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: A small favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d52a1e0fd416/a-small-favor?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I am committed to transparency, so I’ll be honest with you: my campaign must raise $180,000 by November. That sounds like it would be difficult, right? Well, if every person who opened this email donated just $11, **we would immediately hit that goal. ** So, I need to ask you a small favor: [chip in $11.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2a3529fb09&e=140a9b81e7) If we immediately reached our end-of-cycle goal, that would free up**so much time and so many resources.** It would allow me to totally commit my time to talking to the voters of this district and personally spreading our message. And as you know, when our message reaches voters, it resonates with them. Talking with voters is so important in particular because I am running against a Congressman known for his absenteeism. It has been years since he held an open, unmoderated town hall - which he ironically attacked his opponent for when he first ran for Congress a decade ago.

His office has earned a reputation for neglecting constituent requests, and even being hostile. He has yet to make a statement regarding the derecho that caused so much damage across the Midwest. He has been silent about the conflict between police and protestors in the district. And he has been silent about the closing of rural hospitals. But I am spending so much time raising money, I am not able to get out and engage with my future constituents to earn their vote. [I hope I can count on you to help me reach our end-of-cycle goal so that I can devote more time to speaking with the voters.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5792ea56d9&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

Well, if every person who opened this email donated just $11, we would immediately hit that goal. So, I need to ask you a small favor: If we immediately reached our end-of-cycle goal, that would free upso much time and so many resources. It would allow me to totally commit my time to talking to the voters of this district and personally spreading our message. And as you know, when our message reaches voters, it resonates with them. Talking with voters is so important in particular because I am running against a Congressman known for his absenteeism. It has been years since he held an open, unmoderated town hall - which he ironically attacked his opponent for when he first ran for Congress a decade ago. His office has earned a reputation for neglecting constituent requests, and even being hostile. He has yet to make a statement regarding the derecho that caused so much damage across the Midwest. He has been silent about the conflict between police and protestors in the district. And he has been silent about the closing of rural hospitals. But I am spending so much time raising money, I am not able to get out and engage with my future constituents to earn their vote. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Click here to chip in $11!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Four more women who can flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eb5/2493968185/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Flipping the Senate this year is key to protecting our health care. We've watched time and again as Senator John Cornyn and his allies tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act and attacked our reproductive health care. They aren't about to stop trying, and if we allow them to stay in power in the Senate they very well could succeed.

**They could gut the protections for those of us with preexisting conditions, repeal the Affordable Care Act leaving millions without insurance in the midst of a pandemic, and finally achieve their goal of overturning Roe v. Wade.**

We NEED senators who will take our health care seriously, and who will fight to protect our reproductive freedom. **[That's why I'm asking you to pitch in to support my campaign, along with Dr. Barbara Bollier in Kansas, Sara Gideon in Maine, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, and Paulette Jordan in Idaho. ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eb4/2493968185/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")**

They understand that we need protections for people with pre-existing conditions, that the Affordable Care Act is our best line of defense against future pandemics, and that politicians in Washington shouldn't get to tell us what to do with our bodies.

We need to win at least four seats this year to flip the Senate and send John Cornyn and all his cronies packing. Our health care is on the line this year, and we CAN'T afford to lose, Peter!

**[Pitch in now to split a donation between me and these other badass women who will protect our health care and stand up for our reproductive freedom.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eb4/2493968185/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")** Thank you,
MJ
| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eb4/2493968185/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eab/2493968185/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2111&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7d/7f51f7bc/4545d20d/4efa2eaa/2493968185/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas

Round Rock, TX 78683

name: Miryam Lipper
subject: It's getting hard to keep track, friend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
we're doing our best to stay ahead of this |
---
Friend,

We try to keep track of all the money Mitch McConnell and his friends are spending against Jon Ossoff, but it just keeps piling up!

We recently found out that **Mitch's super PAC has spent more money against Jon than any other Democratic Senate candidate** ... and then a week ago, we learned that they've pledged **an additional $6.1 million on top of that!**

Mitch and his allies are spending $35 MILLION (!!!) so far to defeat Jon!

It's getting hard to keep up -- _who knows when Mitch McConnell will drop another pile of outside cash into David Perdue's lap?_

**We're doing our best to stay ahead of this, but I need your help.[Can you chip in $15 right now before our critical mid-month deadline?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2932/5b2c1286/3949f44a/25f36ba5/1489177700/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_13_ml_kp_up?refcode=em_2020_09_13_ml_kp_up&amount=15")**

| Hoosier Republican,

The election in November is just around the corner, and we want to make sure every single Hoosier knows how, when, and where to vote.

That’s why we put together our 2020 Election Information Center.

In just one easy place, you can learn about voting options, find your nearest polling location, and learn when you can vote.
---
| [VISIT THE ELECTION CENTER >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=264200bae1&e=1acd9bb3d6 "VISIT THE ELECTION CENTER >>")
---
| It’s more important than ever that every Hoosier gets to the polls this November and votes.

Hopefully we’ve made it just a little bit easier for you to find the info you need to make your voice heard at the ballot box!

Thanks,
Indiana GOP

Here’s what he had to say about Eugene’s leadership:
_"Throughout his time in public service, Eugene hasn't just talked about reforms, he's delivered results. Whether through his work helping to end the rape kit backlog in Pennsylvania, his audit of Pharmacy benefit managers that spurred legislation that will lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors across the state, or his efforts to hold politicians of both parties accountable, Eugene has proven he is an independent leader who will put the needs of his district first."_
Friend, it’s clear that Eugene is exactly the leader South Central Pennsylvanians deserve fighting for them in Congress. **Not only has Eugene been endorsed by VP Biden, President Obama, and Senator Kamala Harris, but together we’ve managed to build one of the strongest people-powered campaigns _in the entire country._**

This latest major endorsement proves that we have the momentum to flip this seat blue and send Eugene to Congress in November. **And right now, every online contribution is being MATCHED by a group of generous donors -- so there’s never been a better time to join Team Eugene!**

**FROM THE TEAM**

Friend,

Primary Day is _just two days away_. Do you have a plan to vote on Tuesday, September 15?
* **DROP OFF:** If you're voting by mail and haven't returned your ballot, there's still an option: drop your ballot at your local Department of Election office's [**secure ballot drop box**](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/3VGT2uJ1MH6b7ZKRnrkFoA==).
* **IN-PERSON:** Polls will be open from 7 AM until 8 PM on Tuesday, September 15. Find your polling place: **[ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/rcZmDQi53EcOO42XHZHlpQ==)**

BALLOTS MUST BE IN-HAND AT THE DEPARTMENT OF ELECTIONS BY 8PM ON SEPTEMBER 15.
Remember to share why you're a member of Team Carney on social media - make sure your friends and family have a plan to vote on Tuesday.
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Carney

**IN THE NEWS**
****

John highlighted some of his priorities in a ['Candidate Conversation'](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/nZb9BARkOAQcLCLdFIOtAg==) with Delaware Public Media:
* **Healthy Community** \-- John will continue to make science-based decisions with respect to COVID-19
* **Strong Economy **\-- It's critical we balance the need of public health with the need for a strong economy - we need a healthy community before opening the economy
* **Education **\-- Focus has to be on opportunity funding for those from disadvantaged backgrounds

[Listen to the full interview](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/nZb9BARkOAQcLCLdFIOtAg==) with Delaware Public Media.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/0yOCa4t3ibR79Lw3LjUDWw==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/SsTHYAjbV5pfSqkELUFj1w==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/koJ5NG9imoZ8K5cxvWDzfQ==)

Paid for by Friends for John Carney
---
Friends for John Carney
PO Box 2162
Wilmington DE 19899 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/69kZNLleSAXD_SkiFqCBOA==/o6T5FinoaQA0J_LGlUDZOw==).

name: Team Hicks
subject: Did you see Josh on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_hdr]
Did you see Josh on MSNBC this morning, friends?
If you didn't, don't worry — we've got you covered: watch the clip here and, if you're able, chip in to Josh's campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_l1]
Donate ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_btn]
When you do something like military service, you’re entering into a field where you feel like you’re serving something larger than yourself. To hear someone spit on that, and make derogatory comments about your service, is disgusting.
But what’s worse? When Mitch McConnell and Andy Barr silently stand by as these comments are made and won't stand up for veterans.
They only stand up for veterans when it’s convenient — at election time. Our veterans, service members, and lost loved ones are not losers. They’re heroes, and real leaders wouldn’t put up with another elected calling them anything less than that.
It’s time for Kentucky to send a true champion for veterans and regular folks to Congress — someone who will speak up when something is wrong regardless of which side of the aisle it comes from.

Watch a clip of Josh's appearance on MSNBC this morning, and then chip in today to help send Josh to Congress. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_l1&amount=36]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_ld_abx10&express_lane=true&amount=10]

OTHER AMOUNT ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_ld_abxother]

Thank you for being on our team,
Team Hicks
https://www.facebook.com/JoshHicksKY [https://www.facebook.com/JoshHicksKY] https://twitter.com/joshhicksky [https://twitter.com/joshhicksky]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-msnbc?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200913msnbcPM_TH_all_xx_ftr1&amount=5]

| | Peter, I lost.

I lost to Republican Don Bacon in 2018 by a devastatingly slim margin.

[**_Now I have an unprecedented opportunity to unseat him in just 51 days, but it hinges on meeting my critical weekly deadline. I only have 12 hours left, so I 'm asking: Can you rush me $10?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e849/77d4c309/21bc4a9a/2635e3c7/2807513956/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200913_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I'm not going to lie, Peter, losing that race and my opportunity to represent NE-02 was really hard.

But here I am, running again. And I know in 51 days, things are going to be different.

Why?
* Because I am LEADING Don Bacon by a single point.
* Because NE-02 has been designated one of the most vulnerable House seats in the country.
* Because while Don Bacon has been chasing corporate PAC donations, I have raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from everyday Americans like you.

I know the hardworking Americans who supported me in 2018 haven't given up.

But if we want to finally win this tough race, it's now or never.

Peter, can you spare me a few dollars to help me win? If you donate at this link, I will be personally notified of your donation: [**_https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Chip-In-Now#Peter Willis_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e849/77d4c309/21bc4a9a/2635e3c7/2807513956/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200913_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")

In 2018, Republican dark money won. But this time, donations from people like you and me are going to win.

We are going to win in 51 days. Together. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e849/77d4c309/21bc4a9a/2635e3c9/2807513956/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e849/77d4c309/21bc4a9a/2635e3c8/2807513956/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e849/77d4c309/21bc4a9a/2635e3cb/2807513956/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress
---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Virginia, Mark Warner and the future of the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good

Derek,

I’ve said it over and over again — **_there’s nothing more important for Virginia than making sure Mark Warner wins his reelection fight this November._**
Let’s start with what you already know:
Mark is an incredible Senator. He fights for an economy that works for all Virginians. He’s been a fierce advocate for Virginia’s health care and he’s made us proud leading the Senate investigation into Donald Trump’s corrupt 2016 campaign.
Those are all great reasons to support Mark, but here’s another:
**If Mark loses Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate. ZERO. That means Mitch McConnell stays in power and the Senate will continue to get nothing done at a critical moment for our country.**
I don’t have to tell you what a disaster that is. That’s why I’m asking for your help.
**[Can you donate anything you can afford and show your support for Mark’s campaign? Virginia and our nation’s future are counting on it.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zne8xlHiDjtT1hmFVM1zw1qPFQXRKbS51wdEXwfbeJ3lCWe-7TEa7HTpix4RehsVx9gWcxMaMT96TcJvnevFa7XNB8uPvzCJPBYdcUjohBan2BLjVOfTFTKQ7TnukGp7o-3Mopjx0dMXXAcyiloXA5uMLYDt02CHA2yF2dN4elR_yzO6aNsJ-5DlK6p8PU-BsVcogK0OEr6vNpKUCZkKkOr8FB4wJT3BEqYTRi4XS27U4hURJfPGht4s4Gqg7ETVDPSgfXgdeSG_13P1w0pgX_uEphG_KQXIz_jzva6jw8b33wfli61S_OV29xcFZ5JNHOgLt1giN2YiIZOu5wiZjDTltR0HAN8cWPSTj8RlDPiuOWt-3wM0vm1LsAGDOSDX0CY7Rz4hI3duELZJLU3sfR/355/lSrDUB5xTjOi7ypgIXTOGA/h2/adj0nzlQ9CMfswrU9pm-FdJU6DLiBDnG0xyHYQEVbB4)**
Thanks,
Terry

name: Team Warner
subject: About AG Barr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Attorney General Barr has proven he's unfit for office. It's time for him to resign.
|
---

| | Derek --

It's happening again.

Attorney General Bill Barr is abusing his power and acting as Donald Trump's personal lawyer. Instead of fulfilling his sworn duty to work in the best interest of the American public, Barr is directing the Department of Justice to defend the President in a private lawsuit at taxpayer expense.

**Enough is enough. Mark Warner has said it before and it 's more important than ever -- it's time for A.G. Barr to resign.

[We need to act. Add your name to our petition demanding Barr's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac5/53d9897e/55f6610c/1c880bf1/3668006773/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-barrp")

We know this isn't the first time Barr has put his loyalty to President Trump ahead of the American people.** Barr directed the Justice Department to drop the criminal case against Donald Trump's first national security adviser Michael Flynn. Even after Mark Warner pressured the Administration to release intelligence proving that Flynn lied to the F.B.I. and that he was under investigation for a very good reason, Barr continued to protect Donald Trump instead of pursuing justice.

And earlier this summer, Barr ordered peaceful protesters to be forcibly cleared from in front of the White House -- all for a photo op for Donald Trump. Time and time again, he has proven he's more committed to protecting President Trump and his associates than fulfilling his duty to the American people.

**Bottom line: Barr is unfit for office. His resignation is past due.

[Sign our petition demanding Barr's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac5/53d9897e/55f6610c/1c880bf1/3668006773/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-barrp") **

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dac5/53d9897e/55f6610c/1c880bf0/3668006773/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200913_p_1_fl__774__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: asking you for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The Election is already here! |
---
Friend,

Yesterday, I set a $100,000 fundraising goal by 11:59 PM Tuesday night.

**I just got a briefing on the numbers and we're making incredible progress. But -- and sorry for being so direct, but it's crunch time -- I noticed you haven't made a donation this month, friend.**

**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help us keep pace with Mitch McConnell's corrupt machine?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2930/5b2c1286/39732a8b/25f36bf0/2548360158/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_13_jon_5?refcode=em_2020_09_13_jon_5&amount=5")**
| | [DONATE $5 IMMEDIATELY](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2930/5b2c1286/39732a8b/25f36bf0/2548360158/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_13_jon_5?refcode=em_2020_09_13_jon_5&amount=5")
---

Friend, I'm running neck and neck against a GOP Senator who embodies the corrupt Washington establishment.

My opponent, Senator David Perdue, had no objection as huge sums of money flowed swiftly this year to the largest corporations and investment banks in America.

But he apparently decided the hill to take a stand on was his opposition to $1,200 stimulus checks for workers. And then he led the charge to cut unemployment insurance -- _in the middle of this pandemic._

David Perdue only cares about his donors, his party, and himself.

There is so much at stake in this Election, friend.

**And remember, the Election is already here! November 3 is just the last day of voting.**

**[So let's show David Perdue that the people have had enough of his lies, self-dealing, and corruption. Right now, please chip in $5 or any amount so we can hit our $100,000 grassroots goal by Tuesday night and win this race.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2930/5b2c1286/39732a8b/25f36bf3/2548360158/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_13_jon_5?refcode=em_2020_09_13_jon_5")**

body:

---
Peter,

The election is (almost) here. **Early voting begins in exactly _ONE MONTH._**

And here's the gospel truth: This race is tighter than ever. One poll even showed MJ is within ONE POINT of victory -- and you better believe that's got Sen. John Cornyn scared.

It's why the Koch network is spending millions of dollars saturating Texas with pro-Cornyn ads.

So, Peter, we need your help fighting back. There are a lot of undecided voters in this race, **and if we don 't reach them with MJ's message, we risk coming up short on Election Day.**

**[Can you chip in for the first time* so we can counter the Koch network's advertising blitz? We need to raise $50,000 in one day! Every donation will be 100% matched, so there's no better time to give than right now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7f/7f51f7bc/455aae61/4efa2ef8/719687887/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200913.2nd__2089__&amount=10")**

Thank you for standing with MJ. We're almost to the finish line!
\-- Team MJ
_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7f/7f51f7bc/455aae61/4efa2ef8/719687887/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200913.2nd__2089__&amount=10")

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7f/7f51f7bc/455aae61/4efa2efe/719687887/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Gun violence in our community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Enough is enough. It's time for reasonable limits on guns. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d68a5bb219&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Yesterday our district was yet again shaken by gun violence. Delaney Crosby was shot and killed inside University Park Mall in Mishawaka. The shooting occurred in the middle of the day, in a public place.

Two weeks ago, seven-year-old Chrisyah Stephens was shot in a drive-by shooting in South Bend. She was at a birthday party for a family member. She had just started second grade.

With their senseless deaths, the toll of gun violence in our district grows. More lives have been lost, more families are left to mourn, and our community is left to question the safety of pursuing the simple freedoms of daily life: going to the mall; celebrating a birthday; spending time with loved ones.

**My heart breaks for these families. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We must demand a different way.**

The Second Amendment is part of our Constitution, but that does not mean the right to bear arms is unfettered. Just as our Constitutional system properly places limits on our First Amendment right of freedom of speech to protect the health and safety of our citizens — for example, you can’t yell fire in a crowded theater — so too does it allow for reasonable limits on guns.

The gun lobby has obscured this issue into the false notion that any gun safety law will lead to all guns being confiscated. Congress has lost its moral integrity to such an extent that it will not even allow the CDC to research gun violence.

If I have the privilege to serve as your Congresswoman, [I will advocate for commonsense gun safety laws that promote the health and well-being of our communities](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d7e69c1178&e=5886ca081d). Many of these laws have a history of bipartisan support. The gun safety laws I support include requiring universal background checks for gun purchases, reenacting the federal assault weapons ban, banning the use of high capacity magazines, and funding the CDC to research gun violence.

**How many times have we said, “Enough is enough”? How many more times will we need to say it?**

As your representative, I will work toward finding a bipartisan path to reducing gun violence in our communities while defending the 2nd Amendment to our Constitution.

We owe it to Delaney Crosby. We owe it to Chrisyah Stephens. And we owe it to one another and the future of this nation.

Pat
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f99dcac026&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9c251078c9&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d2c1fd8da3&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c46c048e15&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---
| Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066
[Add us to your address book](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8f9c8d9378)

[Unsubscribe](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8f9c8d9378&e=5886ca081d&c=7c657af224)
---
| | Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
---

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Join the fun!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
**I grew up working at a race track,** **and now I 'm in a competitive race for State Senate. ** So what better way to raise money for this race while showing off this fantastic district, _than __with a socially-distant, scavenger-hunt-style fundraising race!_ We're expanding the "racetrack" to State Senate District 18, and hope you'll hop in your car with your favorite pit crew to join us! **Join me on September 27th for Betsy 's Amazing Race!** [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) or contact Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/8BdqBZ0izHgA_ePeFzPwXtYFWOYNVyBlJ4sUMjqjAQU=?subject=Betsy's%20Amazing%20Race)) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) **Date:** September 27th **Time:** You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm **Location:** Meet and begin at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters (2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio) then use your car to follow clues to locations around State Senate District 18! _**Tickets:**_ _All kids are free_ [Individual: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) [Multiple in a car: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) _(not including children-they 're free!)_ [Sponsor: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) [VIP: $500](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/D8tb1VszFdiga7_Qd4qkptXzaWyPxIQ8e6S0Vz_jqIY=) **_ Hope to see you there!_** _-Betsy_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/yr4ZBmHnBTWic5LUX_NsUmnfSz4NK0sYhmOl2XVbpV4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/9pkW_ez2Cyq-OUVyhJKHZxzagIf8foffRGUjCAp0BLI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/S2ziZalwMevKGVX-OBiH-q8cpybiab7S0cYy9vF04nU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HfM3cAsSeGaXOrKB_VesDA08PFePAogQCDrd82IN3NU=/J_aL-nPse4yWutbwy4oq6_3X3uP0Y99tws3EvIaJAZM=)
---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: have you heard the exciting news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Indiana Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s reelection campaign! | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Have you heard the exciting news?

**The Indiana Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s reelection campaign! This is the organization’s first endorsement of a Republican in a governor’s race since 2008.**

“Over the last four years, our team has had the opportunity to work alongside Governor Holcomb, and we’re gotten to know him as a man of character and friend to our state’s law enforcement professionals. He stands with us as we stand for safe Indiana communities – and we’re proud to endorse him for reelection.” - Bill Owensby, president of the Fraternal Order of Police.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=33f91195dcb84cfa9f8ef1ba68d6b44c&_e=g1cVIXPwIMpKDWVx3DHVqKOyF-FKEO-t-Y_xw6P8Dk-SyFy5iN5NbaamQzl4P4Qpwh2i8DRv6NTxWTZurZYmL1j6lWoypJw_GOdtFDBNWYndCmCW-XoCOe6e2quJ4pSk1dUKKzzIeU6KmgmG9mYFiezeYppDhYm3me4omqTqEBbnJkEbWYb_JTUY4Kh5Dvemw98b9GlTFiEnNAXGJIdYZedE4IxEB7v6j-B2Hzk-d14cV7LX-hYt5PF9DB5SLyZnxYjxbOlU20suHcE8XwpqiLCiNNyE15kcnCC0LmwryOd3zDlXYWv2EE2kZCHwFB_y9idQ8ki8_7lrz__YarqVZLoAP4YfJ5XvNIBXBZh4ELti2c4OHG20rZN4YRzK4E04cUOmHJwXh2XWqDo1uLHPPlrlwoZXX4diCpijS8pG4ALe2tgaviw1IaSL1NI-NKj9bCnni1rm8cyIewGl9fEVTEpEI8eJ6XEanhLS4uBNIlY%3D)
_The Indiana FOP represents more than 13,000 law enforcement professionals serving communities across Indiana. The organization’s mission is to protect and serve Indiana law enforcement professionals as they in turn work to serve Hoosiers and keep Indiana communities safe._

Governor Holcomb actively supports Indiana’s brave law enforcement and public safety officers who keep Hoosiers safe throughout the state, having already earned the endorsements of the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC.
[**Join the Indiana FOP in endorsing Governor Holcomb**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=33f91195dcb84cfa9f8ef1ba68d6b44c&_e=g1cVIXPwIMpKDWVx3DHVqKOyF-FKEO-t-Y_xw6P8Dk-SyFy5iN5NbaamQzl4P4Qpwh2i8DRv6NTxWTZurZYmL1j6lWoypJw_GOdtFDBNWYndCmCW-XoCOe6e2quJ4pSk1dUKKzzIeU6KmgmG9mYFiezeYppDhYm3me4omqTqEBbnJkEbWYb_JTUY4Kh5Dvemw98b9GlTFiEnNAXGJIdYZedE4IxEB7v6j-B2Hzk-d14cV7LX-hYt5PF9DB5SLyZnxYjxbOlU20suHcE8XwpqiEQ4wM_1P0skwIkn_CT1IRMabs6jVu-SnukT_zehvH2gLs57GgSnk2OTfwqsJfopirs0RggiGCwbprHhmhRx-IqC2ksa0ZOjLi3_EuPtju44os5Ax-MLedgj-5qUXyOcKsQF6gL3hU0lHMapn2Bb3WBLKCLeGXJ2-miB-_bdnNSEKO5ygSfy3TFKkQT_mgBo45sp5LW0O-aaUuXl7GbjQp8%3D)
The Indiana FOP is now the eleventh group to endorse Governor Holcomb for reelection – including the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC.

Governor Holcomb is proud to stand by these heroes – and he’ll continue to support them every single day. It’s one of the top priorities of his administration.

**“Indiana’s law enforcement officers put their lives on a thin blue line daily, selflessly dropping everything whenever duty calls. They spring into action, putting themselves into harm’s way – and as Hoosiers, we are forever grateful. I’m committed to standing with our law enforcement, now, and always.” - Governor Holcomb.**

Use the button below to join the groups above and endorse Governor Holcomb!
[**Join the Indiana FOP in endorsing Governor Holcomb**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=33f91195dcb84cfa9f8ef1ba68d6b44c&_e=g1cVIXPwIMpKDWVx3DHVqKOyF-FKEO-t-Y_xw6P8Dk-SyFy5iN5NbaamQzl4P4Qpwh2i8DRv6NTxWTZurZYmL1j6lWoypJw_GOdtFDBNWYndCmCW-XoCOe6e2quJ4pSk1dUKKzzIeU6KmgmG9mYFiezeYppDhYm3me4omqTqEBbnJkEbWYb_JTUY4Kh5Dvemw98b9GlTFiEnNAXGJIdYZedE4IxEB7v6j-B2Hzk-d14cV7LX-hYt5PF9DB5SLyZnxYjxbOlU20suHcE8XwpqiFBf_z9L30FD5xAIP5GJJdDO1Xl9nCxGO-1guu75Ga8S7pt9cHzcCreOlQE-GYZNykFHLnb_vDuQg_4j1UFuigONhuJZN5UwREiCvHWmyM0QjBmQaHL9_fQvmPOY4WXwAv46OFmKeFTTXobjuzZDDRD999-a0jkUKxewvVMKA5aOHzvKkisxV2orBkZCySe9LpDdkl-s8vSWAA-82O20p3w%3D)
Thank you,

Holcomb Crew

clean_body: The Indiana Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s reelection campaign! | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, Have you heard the exciting news? The Indiana Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s reelection campaign! This is the organization’s first endorsement of a Republican in a governor’s race since 2008. “Over the last four years, our team has had the opportunity to work alongside Governor Holcomb, and we’re gotten to know him as a man of character and friend to our state’s law enforcement professionals. He stands with us as we stand for safe Indiana communities – and we’re proud to endorse him for reelection.” - Bill Owensby, president of the Fraternal Order of Police. The Indiana FOP represents more than 13,000 law enforcement professionals serving communities across Indiana. The organization’s mission is to protect and serve Indiana law enforcement professionals as they in turn work to serve Hoosiers and keep Indiana communities safe. Governor Holcomb actively supports Indiana’s brave law enforcement and public safety officers who keep Hoosiers safe throughout the state, having already earned the endorsements of the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC. The Indiana FOP is now the eleventh group to endorse Governor Holcomb for reelection – including the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC. Governor Holcomb is proud to stand by these heroes – and he’ll continue to support them every single day. It’s one of the top priorities of his administration. “Indiana’s law enforcement officers put their lives on a thin blue line daily, selflessly dropping everything whenever duty calls. They spring into action, putting themselves into harm’s way – and as Hoosiers, we are forever grateful. I’m committed to standing with our law enforcement, now, and always.” - Governor Holcomb. Use the button below to join the groups above and endorse Governor Holcomb! Thank you, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: We can't believe what Jon's opponent said about the military
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Perdue refuses to condemn the President |
---
Actions speak louder than words, friend.

Jon Ossoff's opponent (and Donald Trump's "favorite Senator"), David Perdue, just launched an ad where he talks about the importance of treating our military members with respect.

In the ad, he said when he first took office, he was "outraged at how our military was being disrespected."
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2931/5b2c1286/397ae232/25f36b3e/1285749179/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry?refcode=em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry_img")
**And yet, Perdue has refused to condemn Donald Trump for _his_ flagrant disrespect for our military.**

The President of the United States has called fallen American services members "losers" and "suckers." He has demeaned Americans who were captured or missing, and didn't want to be seen around wounded veterans.

**_And throughout all of this, David Perdue has remained silent._**

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 right now to help us elect officials who will actually show respect for our American service members -- in actions, not just empty words?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2931/5b2c1286/397ae232/25f36b41/1285749179/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry?refcode=em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry&amount=10")**

| | [DONATE $10 NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2931/5b2c1286/397ae232/25f36b41/1285749179/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry?refcode=em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry&amount=10")
---

If David Perdue can't do something as simple as condemn such unpatriotic remarks, **_that tells us all we need to know about how he feels about our troops_**.

That's why this ad is so laughable, friend. **By claiming to care about our military, while remaining silent as Trump denigrates it, Perdue is lying directly to our faces.**

David Perdue is no patriot, and he does not deserve to be in a position to speak about or make decisions about the livelihoods of our members of the military and their families.

**[Make a donation of any amount TODAY to elect Jon Ossoff, a leader who will actually respect and fight for our troops.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2931/5b2c1286/397ae232/25f36b40/1285749179/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry?refcode=em_2020_09_11_dp_ad_miltry")**

name: Tim Walz

disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Friends, This coming Friday, President Trump will make his second campaign stop in Minnesota in as many months. He is going all-in on flipping Minnesota red because he knows that he will almost certainly secure his re-election if he does. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OVN-Fhp0SQynHhnZFTgTNQ_CnivOg1wqx-bFxmELklY=/nK3dU7RCTzOjvtTt0jwKz41UJXfxbN0wom00D6EQ4jM=?refcode=header-record&amount=25)
---
Friends,
This coming Friday, President Trump will make his second campaign stop in Minnesota in as many months. He is going all-in on flipping Minnesota red because he knows that he will almost certainly secure his re-election if he does.
The MN Senate Republicans see the Trump campaign's focus on Minnesota as an opportunity. They're doing all they can to emulate the President's divisive agenda in the hopes of latching onto his coattails.
On Friday, the MN Senate GOP could have used the special session to help us fight COVID-19. Instead, they chose to fight me, firing yet another commissioner who worked tirelessly for months to protect the economic security of Minnesotans during this pandemic.
If we're going to fight back and ensure Minnesota remains a state where we put people before politics, follow the facts, and govern with compassion and care, we need to hit our 50 days out budget target by midnight.
I just spoke with my campaign team, and they let me know we're still more than $5,600 short.
[**If you 're able, please make a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you're comfortable with today, so we can close the gap by midnight and finish the last 50 days of this election strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OVN-Fhp0SQynHhnZFTgTNQ_CnivOg1wqx-bFxmELklY=/nK3dU7RCTzOjvtTt0jwKz41UJXfxbN0wom00D6EQ4jM=?refcode=body&amount=25)

Tap or click to read more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58307fb46c4dc35a/be587301b11bf604c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58307fb46c4dc35a/97e5e4b0be88c30ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Thank You, New Hampshire! We Did It!!**
Corky is now the Republican nominee for U.S. Senate, thanks to the support of Granite Staters who want change in Washington, and a return of conservative values and common sense.

"I humbly thank the voters of New Hampshire for their support. Granite Staters are tired of career politicians and Washington bureaucrats,” said Corky on the win. “They deserve a U.S. Senator committed to individual liberty and economic freedom, a political outsider who understands how to revitalize our economy and bring common sense and New Hampshire values to the issues we face. This November's election is critical to this state and this nation, and I look forward to working with President Trump to keep America great."

And while he’s pleased with the win, he noted on Primary Night, “We are not celebrating -- we’re unifying.”
The day after the primary win, Corky joined GOP candidates at a unity breakfast, to present a united front with the November 3rd general election looming. Gov. Chris Sununu was on hand, as were other Republican primary winners, such as First District Congressional candidate Matt Mowers and Second District Congressional candidate Steve Negron.

Also attending was Don Bolduc, who vied for the GOP nomination. He and Corky shook hands and agreed that a united front is critical if Republicans want to be successful in November.
|
---
**In The News**
Corky made the radio talk show rounds following his primary victory, speaking Wednesday with NH Today host Jack Heath, and Chris Ryan of NH Now. As he thanked the voters of New Hampshire, he urged GOP unity and reminded listeners he will beat incumbent Jeanne Shaheen in November. Go, Corky! (**[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58307fb46c4dc35a/994c6b12ce338661c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to listen to the Heath interview and [**here**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/58307fb46c4dc35a/271a8e5fb74dab67c3d6b838967d376c/33153) for the Ryan chat.)
|
---
**New Hampshire Loses a True Public Servant**
Corky attended the public memorial service Friday, Sept. 11, for former Governor Stephen Merrill, who passed away Sept. 5.

In a statement, Corky noted that Merrill “was a true public servant and his passing is a profound loss for those who knew him personally, professionally and politically. He was a man of integrity, a true conservative who never wavered in his beliefs. He is credited with creating the phrase ‘the New Hampshire Advantage’ -- a reference to our lack of sales and income taxes -- and believed, as I do, in less government, individual liberty and economic freedom. My prayers are with his family and friends at this difficult time.”
|
---
**Remembering the Day That Changed America**
Corky shared his thoughts on the anniversary of 9/11:
"Today is a somber day, one that commemorates a horrific event in our nation’s history. As we pause to reflect on the loss of life, grieve with the families who mourn their loved ones, and honor the selfless first responders who gave their lives saving others, we stand strong and united as Americans. The senseless acts of terrorism that occurred Sept. 11, 2001, changed our lives forever, but we will continue to move forward and celebrate this nation’s values of liberty and freedom."
|
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: Mike Garcia has an "A" rating from the NRA -- and now he's taking money from a group defending the Kenosha shooter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | | _Mike Garcia has an "A" rating from the NRA, and now he's taking thousands in contributions from the pro-gun PAC defending the white supremacist shooter who killed two anti-racist protestors in Kenosha. It's clear who Mike is fighting for, and it isn't us._

**[Rush a donation of $5 or more right now to elect a leader who will stand up to the gun lobby and fight for commonsense gun safety legislation>> ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc1b/29776869/970ad36/569e5f05/1336256914/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTNfR3Vucy1pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200913_Guns-in")**
---

Peter,

257 days into 2020, there have already been 444 mass shootings in the United States.

**More than 29,000 people in our country have died by gun violence this year alone. This is a uniquely American problem.**

We have waited far too long to act to protect our people from the terrors of gun violence, whether they are kids in their classrooms or worshipers at prayer.

Too many of us -- including the folks here in Santa Clarita -- know just how a shooting can impact a community. We have felt the pain.

**We have seen families mourn and students struggle to feel safe again at school. We have been to the candlelight vigils. We have been to the funerals.**

It is time for change. It is time for real legislation for commonsense gun reform. It is time for our nation to join its peers -- countries that have proven that having fewer guns leads to less gun violence.

But Congressman Mike Garcia just doesn't understand that the time for politicians who serve the gun lobby -- not their constituents -- is over.

He's got an "A" rating and an endorsement from the NRA, and he's accepted thousands of dollars from the Gun Owners of America PAC -- **the same group supporting the legal defense of the white supremacist Kenosha, Wisconsin shooter: Kyle Rittenhouse.**

It is clear whose side Mike is truly on. **It isn't ours.**

I would usually be disappointed at receiving a failing grade, but I'm proud to have an "F" from the NRA. I will stand up to the extreme gun lobby at every turn and at every opportunity. I will fight for reasoned, responsible, commonsense gun laws -- laws that will make all of us safer.

**[If you believe that CA-25 deserves a representative who will work to fight against gun violence rather than rubber-stamp the NRA's agenda, please consider making a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign now. I won't get to Congress to fight for this district without your support.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc1b/29776869/970ad36/569e5f05/1336256914/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTNfR3Vucy1pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200913_Guns-in")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc1b/29776869/970ad36/569e5f06/1336256914/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTNfR3Vucy1pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200913_Guns-in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc1b/29776869/970ad36/569e5f07/1336256914/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTNfR3Vucy1pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200913_Guns-in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")

Thank you,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bc1b/29776869/970ad36/569e5f05/1336256914/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTNfR3Vucy1pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200913_Guns-in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: CWA of Texas Facebook Live Event: Tuesday, September 15
body:
On November 3, our nation will arrive at a crossroads, and the people will decide which direction we go. | |
---
| | |
---
| _Your Voice In_ **Texas** Dear ,

On November 3, our nation will arrive at a crossroads, and the people will decide which direction we go. Now is not the time to sit back and let others decide on the issues of life, religious freedom, judges, and more.

[Concerned Women for America](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=837c449223&e=01c99b7fbd) (CWA) of Texas is mobilizing our grassroots here in Texas to register people to vote and to ensure voters get to the polls to vote! We invite you to join us on Tuesday, September 15, for our **Facebook Live event** where we will discuss ideas on how to engage in the upcoming November 3 election and provide ideas about encouraging our like-minded friends, relatives, and neighbors to register to vote – and then vote.

**Event Details:**
Date: Tuesday, September 15, 2020
Time: Noon CST
Where: Facebook Live event at [Concerned Women for America of Texas](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=f2bf0d1c60&e=01c99b7fbd).

**Please Pray:**
Pray for your like-minded neighbors, friends, and fellow Americans to be engaged in this election season. Pray that they will understand the urgency of the time and will put feet to their convictions — that they would register to vote, be informed, and then wisely do their part on election day.
_“I know of no safe depository of the ultimate powers
of the society but the people themselves;
And if we think them not enlightened enough
to exercise their control with a wholesome discretion,
the remedy is not to take it from them but to inform their discretion.”
Thomas Jefferson_
Join us on September 15. No matter who you are or where you live, you can make a difference in the upcoming election!

Ann Hettinger
State Director
CWA of Texas
[director@texas.cwfa.org](mailto:director@texas.cwfa.org)
[tx.cwfa.org](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8bdf960930&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
|
---

name: [ALERT] - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Mitch McConnell’s 💰💰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He's put a $35 million price tag on Georgia |
---
Friend,

You can actually put a price tag on how worried Mitch McConnell is about Jon Ossoff winning in Georgia: $35 million.

That's how much Mitch and his allies are spending to defend GOP Senator David Perdue (the COVID-19 stock trading guy).

**Friend, we've got to fight back._We have an important mid-month deadline coming up, and we need to hit our goal so we can stay on track for September._**

Unlike David Perdue, Jon Ossoff's campaign is not taking contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We're powered by small-dollar, grassroots supporters like you, friend.

**[Will you chip in $15 TODAY to help us reach our mid-month goal to keep pace with Mitch's money machine?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2936/5b2c1286/397d891f/25f36a8f/3791043597/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_13_35m?refcode=em_2020_09_13_35m&amount=15")**
